raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX I made a booking with XXXX XXXX paying the full advertised rental price, ( {$510.00} ) which their Terms of Service require to be fully itemized and shown on the booking page. A short time later, the host demanded hundreds of dollars extra in an offline communication in violation of the same Terms of Service. I immediately cancelled the reservation, and notified American Express of the fraudulent charge on my card. I made repeated attempts to solve the matter with XXXX, but they claim they are able to keep all of my money regardless of any fraud committed by them. I received no goods or services from XXXX. I have made numerous complaints to American Express who reversed my requested chargeback when XXXX sent them a non-responsive and misleading AI generated document purporting to show I agreed to be defrauded. 
Since then I have made endless and numerous fruitless attempts to raise the problem with American Express. I have gone so far as to write XXXX XXXX, the CEO. He said he would have the matter investigated and get back to me. This has not happened and I have received no report or update. American Express as a bank claims to have a XXXX customer liability for fraud.
